rules: NO Inter, Roboto, or generic fonts.
Headlines (H1/H2) MUST use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Never default to generic bold; use font-medium or font-semibold for crispness.
Overlines and small badges should be uppercase with wide tracking: tracking-[0.2em] text-xs font-semibold.

layout_spacing.padding_scale: Use p-6, p-8, p-12 generously for containers. Cards must have internal padding of p-6.
layout_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 or lg:grid-cols-4 for listing grids. Gap strategy: gap-6 to gap-8.

components.navbar: Solid #0A0A0A background (not transparent). Sticky top with z-50. White/light gray text for links. Subtle bottom border border-white/10.
components.cards: Flat #FFFFFF background. 1px border-gray-100. Hover: -translate-y-1, increased shadow, border-accent/20. No internal scrollbars.
components.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[#FF5A1F] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-[#E04812] hover:shadow-lg. Secondary: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-200 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-50.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF5A1F]/20 focus:border-[#FF5A1F] transition-all.
components.empty_state: High-impact visual. Large illustration, centered text, secondary color text-gray-500, primary CTA to 'Create Listing'. Generous top/bottom padding (py-24).
components.drag_drop_zone: Dashed border border-2 border-gray-300 rounded-2xl bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:border-[#FF5A1F] transition-all flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12.
components.loading_skeletons: Pulse effect using bg-gray-200. Must match the exact geometry (rounded-2xl) of the content they replace.

motion_interactions: Framer Motion for page transitions: initial={opacity: 0, y: 10} animate={opacity: 1, y: 0} transition={duration: 0.3}
Staggered entrance for marketplace listings grid (staggerChildren: 0.1).
All interactive elements MUST have visible hover and focus states (focus:ring).
accessibility_testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='create-listing-submit').
Use color-contrast checking for the orange accent against white backgrounds.
Include aria-labels for icon-only buttons (like the user profile dropdown).

login_background.description: High-end abstract architectural rendering of a modern university campus building at dusk with orange accents. Use for the split-screen Auth page background.

empty_state_illustration.description: Minimalist 3D illustration of an empty premium cardboard box and floating tag. Use for the main marketplace 'No Listings' empty state.

placeholder_lifestyle_1.description: Alternative campus lifestyle image for hero banners or profile placeholders.

instructions_to_main_agent: START WITH EMPTY STATE: The platform must start completely empty. Do NOT insert any fake or dummy marketplace listings. The empty state UI MUST look premium using the provided empty_state_illustration url.
FIREBASE REAL-TIME: Listings must be bound to Firestore onSnapshot listeners so new items appear instantly in the UI.
COMPONENTS: Heavily customize Shadcn components. Remove the 'Vercel-look'. Make inputs rounded-xl and cards rounded-2xl with very soft shadows.
ICONS: Install and use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react. Keep icons consistent.
TEST IDS: Add data-testid to EVERY button, input, form, and link. CRITICAL for validation.
NAVBAR: Implement a dark navbar (#0A0A0A) as requested by the user, contrasting with the light gray (#F8F9FA) page background.
